imageAlt: Apron integration (phase 1) roadmap item preview image
title: Apron integration (phase 1)
summaryBody: Apron is the most requested integration from FreeAgent’s practice partners and represents a high value opportunity to introduce scalable payables (bills and, eventually, payroll) directly from within FreeAgent.
detailBody: Apron is the most requested integration from FreeAgent’s practice partners and represents a high value opportunity to introduce scalable payables (bills and, eventually, payroll) directly from within FreeAgent.
